creator: cnehren+freebsd-bugs@pobox.com
text: An external dependency for this port, net/owncloud-csync, seems to have been folded into this port, and CONFLICTS set appropriately.  However, there was no notice of this in UPDATING, and it broke my portmaster run and confused me for a few minutes.  UPDATING should be, ahem, updated with a note to this effect so that users aren't confused.
